_comment_geohash: 6-character BOM location geohash. Resolve one with: curl "https://api.weather.bom.gov.au/v1/locations?search=<lat>,<lon>" — that returns a 7-character geohash (e.g. "r3gx2f7" for Sydney); drop the last character before putting it here ("r3gx2f").
_comment_influx: Optional: InfluxDB 2.x connection for a local Telegraf-collected temperature history (see WeatherBridge.weatherHistory / InfluxClient). Leave all four empty or omitted to disable — the daemon runs fine without it, the chart just has no history segment.
